# NeoView ray-menu

This directory is the framework-agnostic radial-menu Web Component copied without source changes from the frozen NeoView migration source:

- Source: `src/lib/vendor/ray-menu`
- Repository: `D:/1VSCODE/Projects/ImageAll/NeeWaifu/neoview/neoview-tauri`
- Revision: `a4c4e07401e0e0c3e4d77edba096f6fd5b3e0c45`

React integrations must import it through a deferred feature module. Geometry, edge behavior, keyboard navigation, submenu traversal, selection and animation remain owned by this component rather than application hooks.
